subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! The fragrances of Thy love have attained unto the Most Holy Court, and Thy call hath been heard time after time, again and again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رحیم نفحات حبت بساحت اقدس فائز گشت و ندایت مره بعد مره و کره بعد کره شنیده شد
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @wisdom [hikmat]
